description:
Late on a Tuesday evening, the user receives an email from a local environmental NGO asking whether they can volunteer to coordinate a tree‑planting event taking place next weekend. The message includes a schedule proposal and a short contact list of other volunteers. Shortly after reading the email, a few of those volunteers begin messaging the user directly in the team’s chat thread to confirm dates and logistics.  

Observing the related email and chat context, the proactive assistant infers that the user intends to manage the volunteer coordination. It offers to consolidate all communication into the user’s calendar by suggesting a new “Community Tree Planting Planning” event with the confirmed participants as attendees. After the user approves, the assistant finalizes the calendar entry and posts a confirmation message back in the group chat so everyone sees the agreed plan.
